title: It's time to deep dive on Neural Accelerator!

content.summary: It's time to deep dive on Neural Accelerator! Xavier Verguin Gonzalez (@Xavyiy) Optimize your app's GPU performance with Xcode 26.4. This update introduces new Neural Accelerator and Occupancy profiling counters for M5 and A19 GPUs, plus per-line shader live register counts. Discover these new tools in: developer.apple.com/videos/p… and developer.apple.com/videos/p… — https://nitter.net/Xavyiy/status/2036132735753023962#m
